completed.summary: Fix mute button overlapping tribe text: muteBtn at (10,10) with depth 20 was created after tribeText (12,10), covering characters 'Xi' of 'Xin-xi'. Moved tribeText x to 38, past the ~24px mute button emoji area. All 481 tests pass.

Fix city menu scroll offset inversion: showCityMenu() used '+ scrollX' instead of '- scrollX', causing menu to render off-screen when camera moved (text has setScrollFactor(0)). Also added camera auto-center on starting city — Imperius/Oumaji/Elyrion start positions were off the 800px viewport, blocking unit training. camera.setScroll(cityX-400, cityY-300) on game start. 481 tests pass.

Update GDD.md §3.5 (Cloak Infiltration: ❌ Not in code → [x] Implemented, commit a5f8eaa) and §8.4 (AI low-HP prioritization: ⚠️ no prioritization → [x] Low-HP sort, commit 9564cad). Documentation-only. No stale ❌ or ⚠️ markers remain in substantive sections. Only 4 remaining [ ] items are legitimately deferred scoring extensions (Territorial, Exploration, Monument, Temple) per GDD §1 note. 481 tests pass. Live site 200, 0 console errors.

Add Escape-key pause/resume overlay: semi-transparent 55% opacity backdrop dims canvas, centered 'PAUSED' text, 'Resume (ESC)' button. Pause blocked during AI turn (isAiRunning guard). togglePause() with idempotent pauseGame()/resumeGame(). 11 state-machine tests added. 492 total tests pass.

Sort tribe selection screen alphabetically: created sorted copy of TRIBE_CONFIGS using [...TRIBE_CONFIGS].sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name)) before rendering tribe cards. Tribes now display as Bardur, Cymanti, Elyrion, Imperius, Oumaji, Polaris, Xin-xi. Original TRIBE_CONFIGS array is not mutated. All 492 tests pass.

Coach cycle 2026-06-24T17:05 — review found: (1) Coach's own pause guard fix (340c63f) had INVERTED logic in 7 button handlers — 'this.isPaused ||' makes actions fire when PAUSED instead of blocking them. Changed to '!this.isPaused &&' which also fixes 6 TS strict-null type errors. (2) Player's tribe-sort fix (1082882) not deployed — service needed rebuild+restart. (3) Build was broken with 6 TS errors caused by inverted pause guards; now fixed. 492 tests pass, build clean.

coach_review.notes: Coach cycle 2026-06-24T17:05 — found and fixed 7 inverted pause guards in GameScene.ts (wait, convert, heal, submerge, emerge, infiltrate, enchant). Fix also resolves 6 TypeScript strict-null build errors. Player's tribe-sort fix (1082882) was not deployed (vite preview serves pre-built dist/). Rebuilt and redeploying. Visual comparison subagent dispatched for gto-wizard-clone.
